# Build Principles

<Lead>The decisions that hold across billpay-core. Each one earned its place by winning an argument, and the argument matters more than the name — when you know *why* Exposed beat Hibernate, you also know how to use it well.</Lead>

Two halves:

- **[Tech Stack](./tech-stack/index.md)** — what we buy: the third-party libraries and infrastructure we standardise on, each documented with the alternatives we weighed and why the winner won.
- **[Core Build](./core-build/index.md)** — what we write: how our own code is organised into workflows, stages, activity groups, activities, and clients, and the rules that keep those layers honest.
